Description: Use CodeIgniter 4 route groups with filters for organized and secure routing
Do: Group related routes. Apply auth and CSRF filters. Use controller method routing
Dont: Define routes individually without grouping or filtering
Code Bad: $routes->get('posts', 'PostController::index');\n$routes->post('posts', 'PostController::create');\n// No grouping, no filter, no namespace

Description: Configure CI4 models with proper table validation rules and type casting
Code Bad: Leave models unconfigured using raw Query Builder everywhere

Description: Use Entity classes for type-safe data objects with casts and mutators
Do: Define entities with typed properties and cast arrays for type conversion
Dont: Return raw arrays from models without type safety
Code Bad: // Raw array access:\n$post = $model->find(1);\n$post['title']; // No type safety, no mutators

Description: Use CI4 Filters for cross-cutting concerns like authentication and CORS
Do: Create filter classes implementing FilterInterface. Register in Config/Filters.php
Dont: Put auth checks in every controller method

Description: Use CodeIgniter Query Builder for safe parameterized database queries
Do: Use Query Builder methods which auto-escape. Use where() with arrays for conditions
Dont: Concatenate user input into raw queries
Code Bad: $sql = \SELECT * FROM posts WHERE title LIKE '%\" . $title . \"%'\";\n$this->db->query($sql);\n// SQL injection risk"

Description: Use CI4 validation library with rule sets for input validation
Do: Define validation rules in model or controller. Use custom validation rules

Description: Use CI4 Services for dependency injection and service registry
Do: Register services in Config/Services.php. Access through Services facade
Dont: Create new instances directly in controllers
Code Bad: $model = new OrderModel();\n$payment = new StripePayment();\n// Manual instantiation, no DI

Description: Use View Cells for reusable UI components with their own logic
Do: Create Cell classes with render methods for reusable view components
Dont: Duplicate view logic across controllers and views
Code Bad: // Duplicate query in every controller:\n$data['recent_posts'] = $this->postModel->findRecentPosts();\nreturn view('page', $data);

Description: Enable CSRF protection and use security helpers for safe output
Do: Enable CSRF in Config/Security.php. Use esc() for output escaping
Dont: Disable CSRF or output unescaped user data
Code Bad:
name ?>

\n

Description: Use PHPUnit with CI4 testing helpers for feature and unit tests
Do: Use CIUnitTestCase and FeatureTestCase for proper CI4 test setup
Dont: Test without CI4 context missing framework helpers
